html:
Exclusive to:

“A 14 slots container that will only hold seeds, nuts, and beans. Spoilage is slowed by 50%.”

-

The Seed Pack-It is a Backpack item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.

The Seed Pack-It has 14 slots, but it can only contain Seeds, Crop Seeds, Birchnuts, Pine Cones, Twiggy Tree Cones and Marble Beans. When a seed is picked up by the player, it will go into the Seed Pack-It with priority.

Storing items in the Seed Pack-It will decrease their spoilage rate by 50%.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Sturdily hand-stitched for rambunctious gardeners.
Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Quaint Seed Purse
A pretty purse for all your seed-carrying needs.

Trivia

  • The Seed Pack-It was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • The reduced spoilage rate was introduced in the March 2022 QoL update.

"seedpouch"
“I was getting tired of carrying loose seeds in my pockets.”
–Wilson
“It would be even easier to just set all the seeds on fire.”
–Willow
“Is small pack for seeds.”
–Wolfgang
“Another burden for me to shoulder.”
–Wendy
“INSTALLING NEW STORAGE COMPARTMENT”
–WX-78
“For the practical storage and transport of seeds.”
–Wickerbottom
“A handy pack for seeds.”
–Woodie
“One more thing to lug from place to place.”
–Maxwell
“För carrying wörthless seeds.”
–Wigfrid
“We're gonna fill it with seeds!”
–Webber
“A little organization never hurts.”
–Warly
“Seed carry-arounder”
–Wormwood
“Gotta stay organized!”
–Winona
“For my gardening needs, a place to store seeds!”
–Wortox
“Stuff seeds inside.”
–Wurt
“You can never have too many pockets!”
–Walter
“Extra pocket space is always welcome.”
–Wanda
“A 14 slots container that will only hold seeds, nuts, and beans. Spoilage is slowed by 50%.”

Spoilage is slowed by 50%. |description = Stow your seeds for safekeeping. |ingredient1 = Broken Shell (DST) |multiplier1 = 2 |ingredient2 = Cut Grass |multiplier2 = 4 |ingredient3 = Seeds |multiplier3 = 2 |filter = {{Pic32|Clothing Filter}} {{Pic32|Storage Solutions Filter}} {{Pic32|Food & Gardening Filter}} |tier = 2 |perk = Store Seeds. Contents receive 50% spoilage rate. |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "seedpouch" }} {{Quotes |wilson = I was getting tired of carrying loose seeds in my pockets. |willow = It would be even easier to just set all the seeds on fire. |wolfgang = Is small pack for seeds. |wendy = Another burden for me to shoulder. |wx78 = INSTALLING NEW STORAGE COMPARTMENT |wickerbottom = For the practical storage and transport of seeds. |woodie = A handy pack for seeds. |maxwell = One more thing to lug from place to place. |wigfrid = För carrying wörthless seeds. |webber = We're gonna fill it with seeds! |winona = Gotta stay organized! |warly = A little organization never hurts. |wortox = For my gardening needs, a place to store seeds! |wormwood = Seed carry-arounder |wurt = Stuff seeds inside. |walter = You can never have too many pockets! |wanda = Extra pocket space is always welcome. |choose = woodie}} {{Scrapbook_Info|A 14 slots container that will only hold seeds, nuts, and beans. Spoilage is slowed by 50%.}} The '''Seed Pack-It''' is a [[Backpack]] item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. The Seed Pack-It has 14 slots, but it can only contain [[Seeds/DST|Seeds]], [[Crop_Seeds/DST|Crop Seeds]], [[Birchnut]]s, [[Pine Cone]]s, [[Twiggy Tree Cone]]s and [[Marble Bean]]s. When a seed is picked up by the player, it will go into the Seed Pack-It with priority. Storing items in the Seed Pack-It will decrease their spoilage rate by 50%. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Seed_Pack-It-0|Belongings}}
